description_long: This helmet features a domed, metallic silver crown with a weathered finish, accented by bold blue trim along the lower edge and around the face opening. The front is dominated by a distinctive T-shaped black visor, bordered by blue, which provides a futuristic and protective appearance. On the right side, a prominent blue and silver rangefinder attachment extends upward, adding a functional and iconic element. The rear of the helmet displays a vertical grille-like detail, suggesting ventilation or a decorative feature. The surface shows signs of wear, with scuffs and discoloration, giving it a rugged, battle-worn look. The overall design is reminiscent of science fiction or space-themed armor, with a focus on both protection and style.
description: A weathered, metallic silver helmet with blue trim, a T-shaped black visor, and a prominent side-mounted rangefinder. The design is rugged and futuristic, with visible wear and a distinctive rear grille.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped black visor, blue trim, and the rangefinder attachment on the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth dome, blue trim, and the vertical rangefinder extending upward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the vertical grille detail and the continuous blue trim around the base.
description_view_3: Right side view focuses on the rangefinder mechanism and the helmet's curved blue and silver surfaces.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: A single vertical grille with horizontal slats is present on the rear of the helmet; no other vents are visible.
